role: App.tsx is the top-level tldraw-wrapped layout orchestrator that instantiates the shared editor, builds the app controller, and renders the CSS-grid shell plus view-switchable canvas/review/lattice workspaces with mobile chrome.
capabilities: Mounts <Tldraw> with NodeShapeUtil and ForagerShapeUtil and a persistence key
Suppresses tldraw native chrome via StylePanel/ActionsMenu/QuickActions null components
Creates one editor-bound controller via useAppController and exposes it through AppContext
Renders the Edges screen-space overlay inside tldraw's container
Implements a view switcher for canvas / review / lattice workspaces
Implements a mobile-only top bar with status, tools sheet, and mode selector
Implements a mobile bottom tabbar that toggles bottom sheets and triggers doRun
Lays out desktop regions in a CSS-grid shell with pointer-events passthrough for the canvas cell
Conditionally renders Review and LatticeView workspaces over the canvas
Hosts per-panel error boundaries around every region and a shell-level catch-all boundary
Wires deep-link URL params (?review, ?mockup, ?guide) to set view/mockup/guide on mount
Mirrors active view to body[data-view] for CSS hiding of tldraw chrome in review mode
Auto-raises the RHM mobile sheet when an interactive proposal appears
Renders AnnotateBar for indicated annotate-mode ui:// loci and submits comments
Renders JourneyBar for recording and replaying ordered ui:// click-path journeys
Hosts full-viewport modals for Workshop and Settings outside the grid
substance_why: The file implements the entire top-level layout shell, view switching, mobile chrome, error-boundary hierarchy, deep-link bootstrapping, and orchestration of ~20 regions plus annotate/journey affordances.
interactions_present: Mobile status button dispatches 'open-greeting' custom event
Mobile tools sheet toggles and contains view + Toolbar buttons
Mobile tabbar anchors call setMobileTab and the run anchor calls ctrl.doRun()
AnnotateBar input Enter/button submits text via ctrl.annotateLocus
JourneyBar record/stop button toggles recording via ctrl.toggleJourneyRecording
LatticeView onHandoff sets view to canvas and mobileTab to builder
URL query params drive setView, ctrl.setReviewMockup, and ctrl.startGuide
interactions_missing: No visible loading/empty state for the shell while controller initializes
No keyboard shortcut wiring in this file
No explicit close/back affordance for Settings/Workshop modals in this file
No undo/redo or canvas zoom/fit controls surfaced here
No accessibility attributes (aria labels, roles) on the custom chrome
No error retry/reset UI beyond the boundary fallback
performance_risks: Hud renders all canvas overlays (chat, builder, walkthrough, activity, cognition, etc.) unconditionally; mobile CSS hides them but React still mounts and reconciles them
A single AppContext value containing the entire controller can cause broad re-renders across every region
Edges overlay receives ctrl.edges and may redraw on every controller update
useAppController is a monolithic hook; any state change inside it can re-render the whole Hud tree
MobileTopBar and tabbar are rendered on desktop but hidden only by CSS, adding unnecessary reconciliation
Deep-link useEffect disables exhaustive-deps and runs only on mount, so URL changes after boot are not handled
reuse_verdict_why: The F0 grid-shell, view-switch, error-boundary discipline, and mobile chrome are the right structural ideas, but Hud should be split and the monolithic controller/context should be narrowed to reduce re-render scope.
decomposition_hints: Split Hud into CanvasWorkspace, ReviewWorkspace, and LatticeWorkspace files driven by the view switch
Extract MobileTopBar and the tabbar into a single MobileChrome module
Move AnnotateBar and JourneyBar into an IndicatedLocusOverlays module
Move Edges orchestration and the editor-binding setup into a CanvasOverlay host
Move URL deep-link and body data-view effects into a useBootSurface hook
Lazy-load Review and LatticeView to avoid rendering their subtrees in canvas view
Separate the right-rail composition (Inspector/AddressHelp/History/SelfChanges/Versions/Inbox/Grow/Fleet/RegistryProposals) into a PanelRail component
